hops: props flow: experience-item.tsx ExperienceItemProps extends IExperienceItem -> model/experience-list-item.ts

q: Which component mounts the GPUProvider, as opposed to consuming GPU state?
hops: provider vs consumer: <GPUProvider> only in pages/_app.tsx; consumers footer/visualizer call useGPU

q: Where is the useGPU hook that the Footer component calls actually implemented?
hops: footer.tsx -> hooks/use-gpu.ts (barrel re-export) -> context/GPUContext.tsx; wrong answer trap: stopping at hooks/use-gpu.ts

q: Which two lib functions produce the props that the homepage's getStaticProps passes to the Home component?
hops: data flow: pages/index.tsx getStaticProps -> lib/github.ts getPinnedProjects + getRepoCatalog
